# episode

**Instance Property**

The podcast episode’s name.

## Declaration

```swift
var episode: String?
```

## Identifying the podcast

- **show**: The podcast’s show name.
- **artwork**: The URL to an image on disk for the podcast artwork.

items.description: The URL to an image on disk for the podcast artwork.
items.name: artwork

title: episode
